title: How can I scroll down the full screen on a Kanban-board?
excerpt:
Hi, how can I scroll down the full screen on a Kanbar-board? 
I can scroll down each column, not the screen. 
Is this possible?

posts.author: AlbertKort88 (Albert)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi, how can I scroll down the full screen on a Kanbar-board?
I can scroll down each column, not the screen.

Is this possible?

posts.author: malia.monday (Malia)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Albert! Currently, although the Kanban feature allows you to scroll down on each column individually, scrolling down on the entire view is not available yet.

That said, our product team is eager for this kind of feedback to include in their discussions for future improvement. This feedback can be submitted directly to a dedicated section of our community page. Learn more here
